dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses volume surge (vol_ratio_20 >= 2.0 equivalent to 100% increase) to filter breakout validity. Pivot level approximates 'recent swing high/low' as specific swing calculation unavailable. Entry requires price breakout + volume confirmation. Exit on close below/above breakout level. Direction is context-dependent (long on upside breakout, short on downside breakout). Regime set to TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN per target_regimes specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses volume surge (vol_ratio_20 >= 2.0 equivalent to 100% increase) to filter breakout validity. Pivot level approximates 'recent swing high/low' as specific swing calculation unavailable. Entry requires price breakout + volume confirmation. Exit on close below/above breakout level. Direction is context-dependent (long on upside breakout, short on downside breakout). Regime set to TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN per target_regimes specification.

source_rule_text: Use volume surge as a filter to confirm breakout validity before entry, avoiding whipsaw trades on breakouts lacking conviction.
